title: lichen_l2.c:591 LRU evicted peer can still be logged after secure_zero
description:
In lichen_peer_add() at lines 715-717, the LOG_INF for LRU eviction logs peer_table[slot].eui64[6] and [7]. However, at this point secure_zero has NOT been called yet on this slot (it's only clearing the replay window via lichen_replay_remove). The logging IS correct.

Actually, reviewing more carefully - the secure_zero doesn't happen in this path. The eviction path reuses the slot immediately by overwriting with new peer data (lines 720-723). This is fine.

WITHDRAWN - no bug here.
